observations.archetype_gloss: A place embodying self-destruction and decay, representing internal ruin and the darker aspects of the psyche
observations.summary: The house is depicted as a self-destructive entity, symbolizing a place of ruin and internal collapse that one must not look back upon, indicating a descent into shadow aspects.

evidence.quote: He knew what this place was. A house that had chosen to destroy itself. Some old stories warn you not to look back at such a place when you leave it.
